privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.footerText: Your data is valuable to us and your security is our priority.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At Financial AI, we value your privacy. This privacy policy is prepared to inform you about the information collected, used, and protected while using the application.

collectedData.title: 1. Information Collected
collectedData.personalInfoList:
• Name and email address (during registration)
• Phone number (optional)
• Profile photo (optional)
collectedData.financialInfoList:
• Asset information
• Debt and installment information
• Receivable information
• Financial goals and budget information

useOfData.title: 2. Use of Information
useOfData.content:
The collected information is used for the following purposes:

• To provide and improve application services
• To offer personalized financial analysis and recommendations
• To improve the AI advisor service
• To optimize user experience
• To provide technical support
• Security and fraud prevention

storageAndSecurity.title: 3. Data Storage and Security
storageAndSecurity.localStorageDesc: All your financial data is primarily stored securely on your device. This data is protected by encryption technologies.
storageAndSecurity.securityMeasuresList:
• AES-256 encryption
• Biometric authentication (Face ID/Touch ID)
• Secure data transfer (SSL/TLS)
• Regular security updates

thirdParty.title: 4. Third Party Sharing
thirdParty.content:
We do not share your financial information with third parties. However, the following situations are exceptions:

• Legal obligations
• With your explicit consent
• Service providers (e.g., AI APIs) - Anonymous data only

aiAndML.title: 5. AI and Machine Learning
aiAndML.content: Google Gemini API is used for the AI advisor service. Data shared with AI is anonymized and does not contain your personal identification information. AI providers use this data only to generate responses and do not store it.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: The application uses minimal local storage (AsyncStorage) to improve user experience. This data is stored only on your device and is not used for tracking purposes.

userRights.title: 7. User Rights
userRights.content:
You have full control over your data:

• Access: You can always access your data from within the app
• Export: You can export your data in JSON or PDF format
• Deletion: You can permanently delete all your data
• Editing: You can update your information at any time

childrenPrivacy.title: 8. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: Our application is not intended for users under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from persons under 18. If you are under 18, please do not use this application.

policyChanges.title: 9. Policy Changes
policyChanges.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Significant changes will be notified within the application. We recommend that you review the policy regularly.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.content:
If you have questions about our privacy policy or the processing of your data:

Email: privacy@financialai.com
Web: www.financialai.com/privacy
Address: Istanbul, Turkey

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance and Consent
acceptance.content: By using the Financial AI application, you declare that you have read, understood, and accepted these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the application.

description.title: 2. Service Description
description.content: Financial AI is a mobile application designed for personal finance management. The application helps you track your assets, liabilities, receivables, and installments. It also offers an AI-powered financial advisory service.

responsibilities.title: 3. User Responsibilities
responsibilities.content:
• You are responsible for the accuracy of all financial information you enter into the application.
• You are responsible for maintaining your account security.
• You agree not to use the application for illegal purposes.
• You commit not to provide unauthorized access to others' accounts.

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: All your financial data is stored securely on your device. Your data is protected by encryption technologies. However, remember that communication over the internet is not 100% secure.

aiAdvisor.title: 5. AI Advisor Service
aiAdvisor.content: The information provided by the AI advisor is for general informational purposes only and does not replace professional financial advice. We recommend consulting a professional advisor before making financial decisions.

intellectualProperty.title: 6. Intellectual Property Rights
intellectualProperty.content: The Financial AI application and its content are protected by copyrights, trademarks, and other intellectual property laws. Unauthorized copying, distribution, or modification of the application is prohibited.

disclaimer.title: 7. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: Financial AI does not guarantee that the application will operate uninterrupted or error-free. We are not responsible for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of the application.

changes.title: 8. Changes
changes.content: We reserve the right to change these terms of service at any time. Changes will be announced within the application. Continued use of the application after changes means you accept the new terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.content:
If you have questions about these terms of service, please contact us:

Email: support@financialai.com
Web: www.financialai.com
